title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: Set on the desert planet Arrakis, Dune follows young Paul Atreides as he navigates political intrigue, betrayal, and destiny. Control of the planetâ€™s valuable spice could determine the future of the entire galaxy.

title: The Hunger Games
author: Suzanne Collins
description: In a dystopian future, Katniss Everdeen volunteers to take her sisterâ€™s place in the Hunger Gamesâ€”a televised fight to the death. Her courage and defiance spark hope in a nation ruled by fear.

title: Ender's Game
author: Orson Scott Card
description: Young genius Ender Wiggin is recruited to a military school in space to prepare for an alien invasion. As training intensifies, Ender must confront the moral cost of war and leadership.

title: The Maze Runner
author: James Dashner
description: When Thomas wakes up in a mysterious maze with no memory of his past, he must work with other boys to survive. Each day brings new dangersâ€”and clues about the truth behind their imprisonment.

title: Ready Player One
author: Ernest Cline
description: In a bleak future, people escape reality through the virtual world of the OASIS. When its creator dies, a global competition begins, and teen Wade Watts must outwit rivals to claim unimaginable power and wealth.
